stemHtml: As a result of diurnal variation radiation fog is lifted and a cloud cover is formed. Which statement is true?

options.a: Stratocumulus will develop caused by insolation.
options.b: Low stratus will develop caused by increasing wind speed.
options.c: Layers of altocumulus will develop caused by increasing wind speed.
options.d: Low stratus will develop caused by radiation in combination with low geostrophic wind speed.
